American Whiskey, Bourbon & Rye | World-.description: Old Forester 1920 Prohibition | Whistle Pig 10yr Rye | Belle Meade Bourbon Reserve - All flights are served with our signature candied pecans and spiced pickle juice chaser.
Woodford Bourbon | Woodford Rye | Woodford Barrel Select - All flights are served with our signature candied pecans and spiced pickle juice chaser.
Angels Envy Rye-Rum Cask | Michters 10yr Rye | Whistle Pig 12yr Old World Rye - All flights are served with our signature candied pecans and spiced pickle juice chaser.
Dickel 13 yr | Elijah Craig Straight Rye | Jim Beam Black Extra Aged - All flights are served with our signature candied pecans and spiced pickle juice chaser.

Buns & Such | Arts Hot Chicken Sandwich.description: Crispy-fried chicken breast tossed in our buffalo-style hot sauce and dressed with tangy slaw, bread and butter pickles and a drizzle of icebox dressing. Served with house-made barbecue chips drizzled with icebox dressing

Buns & Such | Braised Beef Sandwich.description: Slow-cooked pot roast topped with roasted red peppers, melted Swiss, horseradish cream sauce, and a lightly dressed arugula salad. Served on a fresh Cuban roll with house-made barbecue chips drizzled with icebox dressing

Buns & Such | Catfish Sandwich.description: Crispy-fried Gulf Coast catfish fillet topped with lettuce, tomato, and remoulade sauce on a brioche bun. Served with house-made barbecue chips drizzled with icebox dressing

Buns & Such | Cuban Sandwich.description: House-smoked pork, shaved country ham, house-made pickles, yellow mustard and Swiss cheese pressed between slices of fresh Cuban bread. Served with house-made barbecue chips drizzled with icebox dressing

Buns & Such | Fried Chicken Sandwich.description: Buttermilk-brined for 24 hours and hand-battered, dressed with hot sauce, aioli, iceberg lettuce, tomato and bread and butter pickles. Served with house-made barbecue chips drizzled with icebox dressing

Buns & Such | The Art Burger*.description: Two beef patties topped with American cheese, Art's special sauce, tomato-bacon jam, lettuce, tomato, onion and pickles on a brioche bun. Served with house-made barbecue chips drizzled with icebox dressing

Buns & Such | The Country Club.description: Grilled chicken topped with white cheddar, pecan-smoked bacon, red jalapeño jelly, lettuce and tomato on a brioche bun. Served with house-made barbecue chips drizzled with icebox dressing

Cocktails with Perks | Apple Pie A La Mo.description: Ole Smoky Apple Pie Moonshine, caramel vodka, apple juice, lemon, and cinnamon simple syrup

Cocktails with Perks | Espresso Martini.description: Mr. Black Coffee Liqueur, vodka and cold brew concentrate are shaken to a frothy delight

Cocktails with Perks | Kentucky Coffee.description: Woodford Britton Barrel Select, coffee and sweet cream

Cocktails with Perks | Peanut Brittle.description: Praline liqueur, Skrewball Peanut Butter Whiskey, salted cream and coffee

Craft Cocktails | Cucumber Cooler.description: Tito's Handmade Vodka with lime juice, simple syrup, and crisp cucumber slices

Craft Cocktails | Espresso Martini.description: Mr. Black Coffee Liqueur, vodka and cold brew concentrate are shaken to a frothy delight

Craft Cocktails | First Class Fig.description: A modern take on the classic Paper Plane. Hemmingway Rye mixed with Aperol, amaro, fig puree and fresh squeezed lemon. Finished with a frothy top and a dried fig

Craft Cocktails | Florida Crush Cocktail.description: Tito's Handmade Vodka muddled with orange and strawberries, a splash of fresh squeezed Florida orange juice and agave syrup

Craft Cocktails | Muleshine.description: American Born Moonshine, peach puree fresh lime juice and a splash of Q Spectacular Ginger Beer

Craft Cocktails | Old Cuban.description: Diplomatico Reserve Rum, lime, house-made simple syrup, dash of bi ers. Topped with prosecco and fresh mint

Craft Cocktails | Old Fashioned Elder.description: Michter's Bourbon, St. Germain Elderflower, dash of bitters, and fancy cherry.

Craft Cocktails | Spicy Watermelon Marga.description: Jalapeno-infused tequila, Dobel Barrel-Strength Anejo, chili simple syrup and fresh watermelon

Craft Cocktails | Strawberry Ranch Water.description: Dobel Diamante tequila, muddled strawberries and lime, agave syrup, splash of Topo Chico and tajin rim

Craft Cocktails | The Honeybee.description: Tom Cat Gin, honey syrup and fresh squeezed lemon topped with house-made honey foam

Craft Cocktails | Tropical Itch.description: Woodford Britton Barrel Select Bourbon, Plantation OFTD Rum, Cointreau, passionfruit, pineapple and lemon juices garnished with your very own bamboo back scratcher

Craft Cocktails | White Peach Sangria.description: Peach moonshine, La Perlina Moscato and fresh peach puree muddled with orange and mango. Garnished with a moonshine-soaked peach wedge

Craft Cocktails | Woodford Blues.description: Woodford Reserve Private Select Bourbon, house-made blueberry syrup and agave

Kids Plates | Cheeseburger.description: served with a veggie and a starch

Kids Plates | Fish Sticks.description: served with a veggie and a starch

Kids Plates | Fried Chicken Sandwich.description: served with a veggie and a starch

Kids Plates | Fried Chicken Tenders.description: (grilled upon request) served with a veggie and a starch

Main Plates | Arts Famous Fried Chicken.description: Buttermilk-brined for 24 hours then perfectly fried and served with creamy mashed potatoes, a cheddar drop biscuit and love

Main Plates | Barbecue Salmon.description: Cured for 24 hours in a dry rub, grilled, and basted with our house-made barbecue sauce. Topped with crispy potato strings and served with creamy mashed potatoes and grilled asparagus

Main Plates | Chargrilled Chicken.description: Two grilled chicken breasts served with sliced avocado, creamy mashed potatoes and a cup of our broccoli & bacon salad

Main Plates | Country Fried Steak.description: Perfectly seasoned, battered then fried and topped with sawmill gravy. Served with creamy mashed potatoes, Southern green beans and a cheddar drop biscuit

Main Plates | Fried Chicken & Doughnuts.description: Two pieces of Chef Art Smith’s famous fried chicken served with EVERGLAZED’s hand-crafted glazed donuts and creamy mashed potatoes

Main Plates | Meatloaf Main Plate.description: House-made meatloaf served with creamy mashed potatoes, Southern green beans and a cheddar drop biscuit

Main Plates | Shrimp & Grits.description: Pan-seared shrimp with tomato gravy and Tasso ham served over creamy Bradley’s grits with a cheddar drop biscuit

Main Plates | Skillet-fried Chicken Pail.description: Art’s spin on piccata. Buttermilk-brined chicken is pounded thin, hand-breaded and skillet-fried, then topped with lemon butter, garlic and capers. Served with roasted potatoes and grilled asparagus

Main Plates | Smothered Chicken.description: Chef Art’s famous fried chicken thigh atop creamy mashed potatoes and sauteed broccolini, smothered in house-made onion gravy and topped with crispy bacon

Main Plates | Southern Pot Roast.description: Slow-cooked braised beef with roasted tomatoes, house-made demi-glace and lemon bu er sauce. Served with creamy mashed potatoes, broccolini, and carrots

Salads & Such | Addie Maes Chicken & Dum.description: Simple, delicious, and filled with house-made dumplings, chicken, and veggies. Just like Momma used to make

Salads & Such | Fried Chicken Salad.description: Crispy fried chicken over mixed greens, pecan-smoked bacon, egg, heirloom cherry tomatoes, red onion, and cucumber tossed with icebox dressing, house-made croutons, and fresh herbs

Salads & Such | Harvest Salad.description: Mixed greens tossed with fire-roasted red peppers and corn, shredded white cheddar cheese, heirloom cherry tomatoes and house-made balsamic dressing. Topped with grilled chicken, avocado, and hushpuppies

Salads & Such | Southern Cobb Salad.description: Smoked turkey with corn, cheese, avocado, onions, pecan-smoked bacon, cucumber, tomato and a sliced hard-boiled egg. Served over spring mix and romaine with choice of dressing

Shine on Tap | Blue Hooch.description: Blue Flame moonshine, lemon-infused moonshine, blue curacao, house-made simple syrup, fresh lemon juice and a splash of Sprite. Our strongest shine on tap | 22oz Jumbo Squeeze 24 | 22oz Refills 16

Shine on Tap | Moonshine Margarita.description: Tequila, moonshine with a splash of fresh squeezed orange and lime | 22oz Jumbo Squeeze 24 | 22oz Refills 16

Shine on Tap | Rumshine Punch.description: Strawberry RumShine, blackberry brandy, banana liqueur, pineapple juice and house-made grenadine | 22oz Jumbo Squeeze 24 | 22oz Refills 16

Shine on Tap | Shine Flight.description: Take flight with a taste of all five of our Shines on Tap flavors!

Shine on Tap | Strawberry Lemonade.description: Strawberry moonshine, freshly muddled strawberries, lemonade and strawberry puree | 22oz Jumbo Squeeze 24 | 22oz Refills 16

Shine on Tap | Sweet Tea Shine.description: Sweet Tea, fresh-squeezed lemon and moonshine | 22oz Jumbo Squeeze 24 | 22oz Refills 16

Southern Shine | Build your own Flight.description: Select any three of our branded 'Shines! All flights served with our signature candied pecans and a spiced pickle juice chaser.

Southern Shine | Infused Flight.description: Sample all three of our House-infused 'Shines. All flights served with our signature candied pecans and a spiced pickle juice chaser.

Southern Shine | Red-eyed Flight.description: American Born | Buffalo Trace | Ole Smoky Blue Flame. All flights served with our signature candied pecans and a spiced pickle juice chaser.

Starters | Bacon-wrapped Shrimp.description: Tossed in our house-made hot honey and served over lightly dressed greens with a remoulade dipping sauce

Starters | Bee Haven Bay Fried Green Tom.description: Shaved ham, rémoulade sauce, and dressed local greens

Starters | Bunch of Puppies.description: House-made hushpuppies served with pimento cheese and red jalapeño jelly

Starters | Fried Pickles.description: Hand-cut spears are pickled in-house, crispy fried and served with remoulade

Starters | Jasper Board.description: An array of Southern charcuterie. Shaved honey ham, smoked sausage, country ham, pimento cheese, tomato-bacon jam, B&B pickles, candied pecans, crostini and crackers

Starters | Key West Shrimp Cocktail.description: Seasoned shrimp tossed with avocado, mango, cucumber and our house-made cocktail sauce. Served with buttermilk crackers

Starters | Thigh High Chicken Biscuits.description: Three biscuits topped with Chef Art's famous fried chicken thighs and bread and butter pickles. Drizzled with hot honey

Sweetness | Chocolate Pecan Pie.description: A 100-year-old Smith Family recipe, served a la mode

Sweetness | Everglazed Doughnuts.description: Hand-crafted and glazed daily by our West Side neighbors at Everglazed

Sweetness | Hot Fudge Bourbon Brownie.description: Dark chocolate brownie garnished tableside with our warm bourbon chocolate sauce

Sweetness | Hummingbird Cake.description: Chef Art’s southern specialty combining pineapple-banana cake with luxurious cream cheese frosting. Served with vanilla bean ice cream

Sweetness | Shine Cake.description: Chef Art’s signature dessert. An adults only butter cake soaked with moonshine syrup. Served with a seasonal fruit gastrique and a scoop of vanilla bean ice cream

Sweetness | Signature Sampler.description: A trifecta of our current signature desserts! Indulge with a petite portion of our Hummingbird Cake, Chocolate Pecan Pie and the chef's seasonal selection with a scoop of vanilla bean ice cream.
